title: FreshStart
description: This is a mod that helps people get back on their feet after death.
body:
FreshStart: Every time you die in the game, FreshStart ensures you're never left empty-handed. This mod provides a starter pack upon respawn, filled with essential items to help you quickly get back on your feet and continue your adventure. No more struggling to recover from a setback—FreshStart has got you covered!

The starter pack, known as the "Revival Kit," includes basic tools, food, and other essential supplies tailored to give you a head start. Whether you're battling mobs or exploring new terrains, the Revival Kit ensures you can jump right back into the action without missing a beat. With FreshStart, your journey is always ready to continue, no matter how many times you fall.
